name: Fisetin vascular function trial in older adults
summary: Phase 1/2 randomized triple-masked placebo-controlled fisetin trial testing endothelial function in older adults, active not recruiting with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API check.
population: Older adults in a randomized fisetin vascular-function trial.

trial_details.horizon_note: Active-not-recruiting older-adult vascular-function trial without posted results as of the June 11, 2026 API check.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is a direct older-adult fisetin vascular-function test and should stay on the trial watchlist.
